nodes.name: Add to Knowledge Graph
nodes.notes: Writes entity to Graphiti knowledge graph via MCP. If this fails, workflow continues (Postgres write still succeeds).

meta.description: HTTP Request building block to write entities to Graphiti knowledge graph via MCP API
meta.usage: Connect after preparing entity_name and entity_description fields. Requires GRAPHITI_URL environment variable.

inputs_required.entity_name: string - Name of the entity (e.g., business name)
inputs_required.entity_description: string - Human-readable description with all entity attributes

meta.error_handling: Continue On Fail enabled - workflow proceeds even if graph write fails
